summary: Iteration 10 backend testing for WhatsApp meeting time formatting fix. All 8 new meeting-time tests + 12 regression tests (iter6 timezone/checkin/status/leave/WFH) pass — 20/20 green.
critical_code_review_comments: notification_service._fmt_meeting_range gracefully falls back to raw strings when starts_at is unparseable — good, no crash.

routes/meetings.py MeetingCreate declares ends_at as required (str). The 'missing ends_at' case is only reachable via a direct call to notify_meeting_scheduled — HTTP callers cannot omit it. That is fine per current UX but worth noting if any future flow (e.g. calendar sync) tries to omit it.

_parse_meeting_dt localizes naive datetimes via replace(tzinfo=tz) which is correct for fixed-offset zones and acceptable elsewhere; for DST-ambiguous local times (e.g. fall-back hours in America/New_York) this may pick the pre-transition offset. Not an issue for IST/UTC. Consider using zoneinfo-native constructors + `fold` if this becomes global.
seed_data_creation: Ensured Maya's employee record has a phone (+919999999999) so outbox rows get written. Left tenant config restored: enabled=true, provider=azmarq, timezone=Asia/Kolkata, templates.meeting_scheduled=meeting_scheduled_v1.

verified_scenarios.naive_IST_input: starts_at='2026-07-01T16:00', ends_at='2026-07-01T16:30' → params=[attendee, organizer, title, '01 Jul 2026 (Wed)', '04:00 pm → 04:30 pm IST']; exactly 5 params; arrow is U+2192; lowercase am/pm.
verified_scenarios.utc_offset_input: starts_at='2026-07-01T10:30:00+00:00' + Asia/Kolkata tenant tz → '04:00 pm → 04:30 pm IST' (UTC+5:30 conversion applied).
verified_scenarios.tz_override_UTC: PUT timezone=UTC, naive '16:00' input → '04:00 pm → 04:30 pm UTC' (wall-clock preserved). Restored to Asia/Kolkata after.
verified_scenarios.missing_ends_at: Called notify_meeting_scheduled directly with ends_at='' → outbox written, time_range='04:00 pm IST' (no arrow), no exception.
verified_scenarios.garbage_timestamp: POST /api/meetings with starts_at='garbage' → HR endpoint returned 200/201, outbox row contains raw strings, no crash in logs.
verified_scenarios.leading_zero_midnight_noon: _fmt_meeting_range unit checks: 09:00 am (leading zero), 12:00 am (midnight), 12:00 pm (noon) — all correct.
verified_scenarios.regression_checkin_status_leave_wfh: All 12 iter6 tests still pass; check-in/out format unchanged '%d %b %Y, %H:%M IST'.

context_for_next_testing_agent: Test file /app/backend/tests/test_whatsapp_meeting_time.py is standalone (pytest -q). Requires REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL env var. Tenant is left in the exact state main-agent context requires: azmarq + Asia/Kolkata + meeting_scheduled_v1 template. Maya's employee record now has phone +919999999999.
rca of the issue: N/A — this iteration was a verification pass of the previously-shipped fix; no bugs found. Fix ships: notify_meeting_scheduled(...ends_at=...) + _parse_meeting_dt (naive → tenant-tz wall-clock, aware → convert) + _fmt_meeting_range (date_str + time_range with lowercase am/pm and U+2192 arrow).
